# pr-review compression Sub 2: Pilot extraction (§5.3 MCP-Tool-Description Budget)

## Context
This is Sub-issue 2 of Epic #10537 (Modularize pr-review-guide.md condition-gated audits).
It executes the pilot extraction of the condition-gated §5.3 MCP-Tool-Description Budget Audit out of the monolithic `pr-review-guide.md` and into a dedicated reference file.

## The Problem
The §5.3 audit is condition-gated (fires only when touching `openapi.yaml`) but currently lives inline in the monolithic `pr-review-guide.md`. This consumes token budget and attention span on every review cycle, even though the trigger condition is met rarely (empirical 17% trigger rate).

## The Fix
Extract the content of §5.3 into `.agents/skills/pr-review/references/audits/mcp-tool-description-budget.md`.
Replace the inline §5.3 content in `pr-review-guide.md` with a one-line gate referencing the new file.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [x] Extract §5.3 to `.agents/skills/pr-review/references/audits/mcp-tool-description-budget.md`
- [x] Replace inline §5.3 content in `pr-review-guide.md` with a one-line gate
- [x] Ensure the extraction is covered under a valid PR (currently #10613)

## Out of Scope
- Modifying other condition-gated audits (Sub-issue 3/4)
- Gathering the baseline metrics (completed in Sub-issue 1 #10540)

## Related
- Epic: #10537
- Sub-issue 1 (Baseline): #10540
- PR: #10613
